name: Gardner's Awesome Turkey Loaf
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces frozen chopped spinach, defrosted and squeezed almost dry
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Spray a 9x5x2-3/4-inch loaf pan with no-stick cooking spray.
3. In a large mixing bowl, thoroughly mix all ingredients except for 2 tablespoons ketchup.
4. Bake in the center of the oven for 50 to 60 minutes or until the internal temperature reaches 160 degrees.
5. Let cool in the pan for 10 minutes, then transfer to a serving platter.
6. Allow to cool another 5 minutes before slicing.
